name: Martin Andrews
quote: Started here at 49 years old. The support and mental health benefits are life-changing, making this far more than a martial arts club.

name: Jez Smart
quote: Made to feel extremely welcome. Amazing and friendly atmosphere, perfect place to start or restart your BJJ journey.

name: Andrew Selby
quote: After a long hiatus from Jiu Jitsu, the facility is fantastic with clear instruction. Once you start you won't stop.

name: Jamie Moore
quote: No hesitation signing up as a member. Relaxed and fun atmosphere, fantastic facilities.

name: Sam Benson
quote: Outstanding academy. State of the art equipment with a relaxed atmosphere and great people.

name: Aaron Allen
quote: Amazing place with a nice relaxed atmosphere. Instructor Mark is one of the best and a real down to earth guy.
